channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-30 08:53 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The largest cultural exchange in history just dropped.
item.description: The largest cultural exchange in history just dropped.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grokの自動翻訳によって日本のX好きが世界に急速にバレ始めています...！ このポストもきっとバレるので、みなさんがなぜXを使っているのかを、リプライか引用ポストで教えてください。世界規模で意見交換...
item.description: Grokの自動翻訳によって日本のX好きが世界に急速にバレ始めています...！ このポストもきっとバレるので、みなさんがなぜXを使っているのかを、リプライか引用ポストで教えてください。世界規模で意見交換できるかも🌎️

item.title: @elonmusk: このアプリは絶対に消さない
item.description: このアプリは絶対に消さない

item.title: @elonmusk: Cancel all tariffs on Japan and mail everyone a Green Card.
item.description: Cancel all tariffs on Japan and mail everyone a Green Card.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink satellites in the sky over Japan
item.description: Starlink satellites in the sky over Japan

item.title: @elonmusk: Every time I hear some woke screenwriter or reviewer talk about the need for “morally complex” plots...
item.description: Every time I hear some woke screenwriter or reviewer talk about the need for “morally complex” plots or “morally grey” heroes, I think of this quote from Nietzsche. “They muddy the water, to make it seem deep.”

item.title: @elonmusk: It's extremely delightful seeing the third world slop replaced by Japanese gemposts. Who knew you co...
item.description: It's extremely delightful seeing the third world slop replaced by Japanese gemposts. Who knew you could just flip the switch and beautify the timeline!

item.title: @elonmusk: President Trump has the power to convene the Senate under Article II, Section 3 of the Constitution ...
item.description: President Trump has the power to convene the Senate under Article II, Section 3 of the Constitution “on extraordinary Occasions.” If a department with 260,000 employees (DHS) going unfunded isn’t an “extraordinary occasion”—especially while the Senate is out on a two-week recess during that shutdown with no plans to resolve the impasse beyond “we’ll deal with that in two weeks”—I don’t know what is.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only with Grok understanding every language and recommending content can this be done. This has been...
item.description: Only with Grok understanding every language and recommending content can this be done. This has been a long-time goal.
